name: full_analysis
description: Run all 5 analysis agents (sentiment, fundamental, technical, news, analyst) in parallel for a stock and compute a composite score. Returns consolidated results within 30 seconds.

name: single_analysis
description: Run a single analysis dimension for a stock. Use this to retry a failed analysis.

analysis_type.description: Type of analysis: sentiment, fundamental, technical, news, or analyst

name: generate_portfolio
description: Generate a diversified portfolio of stock recommendations based on user preferences.

preferences.description: User preference profile with riskTolerance, preferredSectors, favoriteStocks, investmentHorizon
